verdict.answer_first: Tie: both answer immediately; A says "use a managed auth provider, don't roll your own" and B says "Use a managed provider, not your own."
verdict.decisiveness: A commits more cleanly to the main decision: "use a managed auth provider"; B later narrows to "Clerk or Supabase" but still leaves the final choice conditional.
verdict.fabrication: Both make unsupported concrete claims; A: "gets expensive fast" / "history of jumps"; B: "Both get you to production in a day" and "won't surprise you on the bill."
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on because it gives a decision rule by customer type and stack: "B2C consumer app → Clerk or Supabase. Selling to businesses → WorkOS or Auth0."
